title: Device Settings - Setting change propagation
scenario: Device settings changes made in Poly Studio Mobile app are not propagated to other connected devices (e.g., Poly Lens mobile/desktop app)
steps: Pair and connect a Poly Bluetooth headset to Phone A via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Pair and connect the same headset to Phone B (or desktop) running Poly Lens mobile/desktop app.
On Phone A, open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to the Home screen and tap the device name or the "..." (More) button to enter Device Settings.
Change a setting value (e.g., ANC mode, Transparency Mode, Equalizer preset, or Notification settings).
On Phone B (or desktop), open the Poly Lens app and verify the corresponding setting reflects the change made on Phone A.
Repeat steps 5–6 for each available device setting (Audio Settings → ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, etc.).
expected: All setting changes made in the Poly Studio Mobile app on Phone A are propagated and visible in the Poly Lens app on the other connected device.
